user.name: John
user.bio: A normal guy

comment.body:
my market theory post, and basically first start to learn what is market, how the structure is built: insitutionals, retails, non-directionary traders. etc.
economic cycles... Ray Dalio has an insanely good presentation on youtube: "How the economic machine works in 30 mins".. check it.
and need to get familiar what is a stock, a bond, commodities, currencies etc. how things effect each other... how market went from gold backed money to fiat money, what it means, 
you have to understand basic maths: ratios, compounding formulas, 
what do a company does, how to read a report, 
then buy and read Benjamin Graham's intelligent investor book.
Learn whats the difference between a speculant and an investor... 

and start with stocks maybe on paper account. 
if it is okay, you can start to check what is a derivative asset, and whats the purpose behind it, how the fair value is determined etc. 
so yepp
